name: Sweet Potato Bread

ingredients.item: liquid) • 1 1/4 cup granulated sugar • 1/3 cup water
• a third cup of vegetable oil
• a quarter teaspoon of baking powder

method: Heat the oven degrees Fahrenheit (180 degrees Celsius). Using
cooking spray, coat a 9x5 loaf pan (or small loaf pans). Remove
Mash sweet potatoes in a large mixing basin with 2 tablespoons
Combine the mashed sweet potatoes, sugar, water, oil, and eggs
Combine flour, baking soda, salt, nutmeg, cinnamon, and
allspice, as well as baking powder, in a mixing bowl. Mix
Evenly pour into prepared pan (s). Bake for 60-70 minutes in

Allow it to cool in the pan for 15 minutes. After that, allow
cooling entirely on a wire rack.
Place in an airtight jar to keep fresh.
